blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Add detailed tracking for all customer acquisition sources
Implement an endpoint that returns a comprehensive list of all customer acquisition sources with metrics.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of identifying customer acquisition sources, specifically where bookings come from. While the evidence mentions 'Top referrer: Instagram (28% of new customers)' in the linked use case, it does not provide a comprehensive view of all customer acquisition sources or a systematic method for tracking them. This indicates a gap in the evidence as it does not fully cover the requirement of detailing all sources of customer acquisition, which is necessary for validation.
gaps: Insufficient evidence detailing all customer acquisition sources beyond a single referrer.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add detailed tracking for all customer acquisition sources
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Implement an endpoint that returns a comprehensive list of all customer acquisition sources with metrics.
